{{Quote|Shame is a scarce commodity in politics. And there are more politicians than statesmen...|Behn-Kihl-Nahm|<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Behn-Kihl-Nahm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who served in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Behn-Kihl-Nahm served as the [[Chair of the Senate/Legends|Chair of the Senate]] as well as the chairbeing of the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]]. As a close political ally and personal friend of [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], who nicknamed him "Bennie". The Chair of the Senate worked hard to deflect the political attacks aimed at Organa Solo following [[Darama]] [[Nil Spaar]]'s departure from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
